text: Verses 1-8 are generally understood as a prophecy, e.g. of the reforming activities of king Ezechias. But they may be read simply as an expression of proverbial truths; and indeed the whole tone of them recalls that of the Wisdom literature.
Literally, ‘gloom and a groping over caverns’. The Hebrew text seems rather to mean, ‘Ophel and the watch-tower shall be turned into caverns’.
It is not clear whether this refers to the security which God’s people are later to enjoy, or whether it is a proverb whose meaning is now lost to us.
